---
id: execute-device-command-await
title: "向设备下发 Command 并等待响应"
description: "通过 command 控制设备，并在服务端获取设备响应。<br />"
sidebar_label: "向设备下发 Command 并等待响应"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"向设备下发 Command 并等待响应"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/command/execute/await"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



通过 command 控制设备，并在服务端获取设备响应。<br />
以下 command 可响应：<br />
`APIGetIrDeviceCategoriesForApp(40263)`  
`APIGetBrandsByCategoryForApp(40267)`  
`APIGetMatchTreeForApp(40268)`  
`APIClickIrKeyForApp(40273)`  
`APISaveMatchedRemoteInfoForApp(40292)`  
`SetIRDeviceInfo(40288)`  
`IRCodeMatchStatus(20591)`  
`APICreateIrVirtualDeviceForApp(40281)`  
`SendIrKey(40305)`
`APIStartIrLearningForApp(40280)`  
`IRLearnResult(20618)`  
`APIAddIrKeyForApp(40275)`    


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码，如：NetworkCommissioning"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码，如：TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload"},"args":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"命令参数","required":["fieldCode","value"],"properties":{"fieldCode":{"type":"string","description":"字段编码"},"value":{"description":"字段值。类型与对应 field 的 parameter.type 保持一致。","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"CommandArg"},"description":"命令字段对象列表"}},"title":"CommandExecuteItem"}}},"title":"CommandExecuteRequest"},{"type":"object","properties":{"timeoutMs":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"等待设备命令上报超时（毫秒）；不传使用服务端默认值。","minimum":1000,"maximum":10000}}}],"title":"CommandExecuteAwaitRequest"},"examples":{"executeCommandAwait":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","args":[{"fieldCode":"InstallCode","value":"F9B34846413AB5DE81B60E63E440"},{"fieldCode":"MAC","value":"54EF441000EB0CCF"}]}],"timeoutMs":5000}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功（data 返回每条命令的执行及设备上报结果）","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode","code","message","responded"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID。"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码。"},"commandCode":{"type":"string"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"执行结果码。"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"执行结果描述。"},"responded":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否收到设备该 command 的上报。"},"commandReportValue":{"type":"string","description":"设备该 command 的上报原始字符串，由调用端自行解析。"},"responseTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"设备 command 上报时间（毫秒时间戳）。"}},"title":"CommandExecuteAwaitResult"}}}}],"example":{"type":"ExecuteCommandAwaitResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-00000000001a","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","code":0,"message":"success","responded":true,"commandReportValue":"{\"result\":\"ok\"}","responseTime":1710001234567}]},"title":"CommandExecuteAwaitResponse"},"examples":{"commandExecuteAwaitSuccess":{"value":{"type":"ExecuteCommandAwaitResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecfa","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","code":0,"message":"success","responded":true,"commandReportValue":"{\"result\":\"ok\"}","responseTime":1710001234567}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
